chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P. No.D-1854 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on urgency application 2. For orders on office objection 3. For orders on exemption application 4. For orders on stay application 5. For hearing of main case 09.10.2025 Ms. Sadaf Nafees, Advocate along with petitioners. ----- 1. Urgency granted. 2. Deferred for the time being. 3. Exemption is granted subject to all just exceptions. 4&5. Learned Counsel for the petitioners submits that Petitioner No.1 being sui-juris has contracted marriage with petitioner No.2 out of her own volition, free from coercion or pressure but against the wishes of her parents, as such, her brother Muhammad Imran (Respondent N.8) being annoyed with such marriage has lodged an F.I.R. bearing Crime No.1845/2025, u/s 365-B PPC on 22.09.2025 at PS Badami Bagh, Lahore, Punjab, on false allegations. When confronted, learned Counsel for the Petitioners submits that since the aforesaid FIR relates to Punjab Province and the Petitioner No.1 intends to record her statement u/s 164 Cr.P.C before the concerned Magistrate in Punjab, this Petition may be converted into protective bail and the petitioners may be admitted to protective bail. In view of above, this petition is converted into an application for protective bail. Office is directed to assign proper number to this application and the applicants are granted protective bail for 07 days subject to execution of P.R. Bond to the satisfaction of Additional Registrar of this Court. This order shall cease to have its effect on expiry of 07 days or on surrender of the applicants before the concerned Court, whichever is earlier.

Bond to the satisfaction of Additional Registrar of this Court. This order shall cease to have its effect on expiry of 07 days or on surrender of the applicants before the concerned Court, whichever is earlier. The bail application stands disposed of in the above terms along with Application listed at serial No.4. JUDGE JUDGE Ali Haider
